title: CIRCE-BE Java Implementation Schema
description: JSON Schema extracted from Java CIRCE-BE source code

CohortExpression.description:
Main cohort expression class containing all cohort definition components.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.CohortExpression
CohortExpression.title: CohortExpression

ConceptSetExpression.description:
Represents a concept set expression.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.vocabulary.ConceptSetExpression

Note: isExcluded, includeMapped, includeDescendants may not be present in all Java JSONs
(they're sometimes only on the items), so we provide defaults.
ConceptSetExpression.title: ConceptSetExpression

ConceptSetItem.description:
Represents an item in a concept set.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.vocabulary.ConceptSetItem
ConceptSetItem.title: ConceptSetItem

Concept.description:
Represents a concept in the OMOP vocabulary.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.vocabulary.Concept
Note: In Java, conceptId is Long (nullable), but JSON schema marks it as required.
We make it Optional to match Java runtime behavior while maintaining schema compatibility.
Concept.title: Concept

ResultLimit.description:
Represents a result limit for cohort expressions.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.ResultLimit
ResultLimit.title: ResultLimit

Occurrence.description:
Represents occurrence settings for criteria.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.Occurrence

Note: In Java, EXACTLY, AT_MOST, AT_LEAST are static final constants.
The JSON schema extraction treats them as required fields, so we include
them as required instance fields. They should always be set to their constant values.
For class-level access, use the _EXACTLY, _AT_MOST, _AT_LEAST constants.
Occurrence.title: Occurrence

DemographicCriteria.description:
Represents demographic criteria for cohort definition.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.DemographicCriteria
DemographicCriteria.title: DemographicCriteria

DateRange.description:
Represents a date range with operation, extent, and value.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.DateRange
DateRange.title: DateRange

ConceptSetSelection.description:
Represents a concept set selection.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.ConceptSetSelection
ConceptSetSelection.title: ConceptSetSelection

NumericRange.description:
Represents a numeric range with operation, value, and extent.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.NumericRange
NumericRange.title: NumericRange

EndStrategy.description:
Represents the end strategy for cohort expressions.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.EndStrategy
EndStrategy.title: EndStrategy

PrimaryCriteria.description:
Represents the primary criteria for cohort definition.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.PrimaryCriteria
PrimaryCriteria.title: PrimaryCriteria

Criteria.description:
Represents a criteria with date adjustment and correlated criteria.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.Criteria
Criteria.title: Criteria

DateAdjustment.description:
Represents date adjustment settings.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.DateAdjustment
DateAdjustment.title: DateAdjustment

ObservationFilter.description:
Represents observation window filter settings.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.ObservationFilter
ObservationFilter.title: ObservationFilter

CollapseSettings.description:
Represents collapse settings for cohort expressions.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.CollapseSettings
CollapseSettings.title: CollapseSettings

Period.description:
Represents a time period with start and end dates.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.Period
Period.title: Period

WindowedCriteria.description:
Base class for windowed criteria.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.WindowedCriteria
WindowedCriteria.title: WindowedCriteria

GeoCriteria.description:
Base class for geographic criteria.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.GeoCriteria
GeoCriteria.title: GeoCriteria

DateOffsetStrategy.description:
Date offset end strategy.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.DateOffsetStrategy
DateOffsetStrategy.title: DateOffsetStrategy

CustomEraStrategy.description:
Custom era end strategy.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.CustomEraStrategy
CustomEraStrategy.title: CustomEraStrategy

Window.description:
Represents a time window for criteria.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.Window
Window.title: Window

TextFilter.description:
Represents text filtering capabilities.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.TextFilter
TextFilter.title: TextFilter

InclusionRule.description:
Represents an inclusion rule for cohort definition.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.InclusionRule
InclusionRule.title: InclusionRule

WindowBound.description:
Represents a window bound for time windows.

Java equivalent: org.ohdsi.circe.cohortdefinition.WindowBound
WindowBound.title: WindowBound
